surface_verification.justification: Client-only mobile/touch terminal UX change (no server/API change). F0.5 web surface verified against an isolated single-process stack (built SPA + API, temp USERPROFILE, :3947): mobile-chromium (Pixel 5, hasTouch) 17/17 including the AC-1 header-condense (breadcrumb + meta sub-line hidden) and AC-2 white-border/white-glyph real-browser computed-style assertions; PLUS desktop chromium terminal regression specs 88 (tab-autofocus) / 91 (repaint-on-refocus) / 92 (reflow repaint) = 5/5, which exercise the AC-4 settle-repaint path on a LIVE pty and confirm a width change still produces a full-viewport repaint after the redraw settles. AC-3 (touch-scroll behavior at Claude's --resume picker) and AC-4 (absence of visible smear) final on-device behavior are device-UAT (requires-physical-device) per the spec ledger.

behaviors.behavior: AC-1: task-detail breadcrumb + meta sub-line are dropped at phone width and rendered at desktop width
behaviors.evidence: TaskDetailHeader.test.tsx 'phone header condense (AC-1)' (matchMedia mock both bands) + e2e 90-phone-responsive 'header is condensed on a phone'

behaviors.behavior: AC-1: condensed header introduces no horizontal page overflow at phone width
behaviors.evidence: e2e 90-phone-responsive 'header is condensed on a phone' (pageOverflowPx <= 1)

behaviors.behavior: AC-2: touch keys carry a visible (white) border + white glyph, old grey token removed
behaviors.evidence: TerminalKeyBar.test.tsx 'keys carry a white border + white text' + e2e 90 computed-style (borderTopWidth>0, color == browser white)

behaviors.behavior: AC-2: read-only reader keys stay visibly muted (disabled:opacity-40 retained)
behaviors.evidence: TerminalKeyBar.test.tsx 'read-only reader keys stay visibly muted'

behaviors.behavior: AC-3: routeScroll pans the scrollback (scrollLines) in the normal buffer EVEN WHEN mouse-tracking is on
behaviors.evidence: touch-scroll.alt-buffer.test.ts 'normal buffer WITH mouse tracking: pans the scrollback via scrollLines, NOT a wheel'

behaviors.behavior: AC-3: routeScroll still forwards a wheel in the alt-screen buffer (Claude TUI / vim / less)
behaviors.evidence: touch-scroll.alt-buffer.test.ts alt-buffer wheel cases (down/up + finger-position coords)

behaviors.behavior: AC-3: a finger-pan actually scrolls at the live Claude --resume 'load full/summary' picker
behaviors.reason: the live buffer/mouse-tracking state at the picker + real touch can only be confirmed on the iPhone (device UAT)

behaviors.behavior: AC-4: settle-repaint arms on resize/explicit-arm, repaints on each parsed write (coalesced), disarms on quiet-gap or hard cap, cancels the queued frame on disarm, leak-safe disposal
behaviors.evidence: repaint-on-settle.test.ts (11 cases incl. late-first-write, quiet-reset, hard-cap, disarm-cancels-frame, onResize self-arm, dispose)

behaviors.behavior: AC-4: useTerminalResize arms the settle window on tab-activation + focus/visibility/pageshow (incl. same-dims), NOT on the RO resize path, guarded by disposedRef
AC-4: a width change produces a full-viewport repaint after the reflow settles on a live terminal (no regression from removing the fixed-delay repaints)
AC-4: no visible input-area smear after a Transcript->Terminal switch / return-from-home on the device
behaviors.reason: WebGL partial-dirty smear over a real mobile WS + iOS backgrounding reproduces only on the iPhone (device UAT)
